value: Here's everything you need to know to make the most of your stay.
We know your free time is precious, so we've created this digital guide to keep things simple and stress-free. From check-in info to Wi-Fi codes, from local gems to top eats — it's all right here.
Do You Really Need This Info?
Think of this guide as having us "virtually" by your side, showing you:
Okay, maybe not that last one — but we hope you leave relaxed, recharged, and smiling.

Meet Your Hosts – Welcome from Cozie Homes
This holiday apartment is proudly hosted by Cozie Homes, a Cairns-based hospitality company managing over 156 holiday homes across Cairns and the surrounding areas.
We're a passionate local team made up of:
And even a travel concierge — all here to make your stay seamless.

Hi, I'm Thomas, founder of Cozie Homes.
It all started with me renting out a single room in my home — and today, I'm thrilled to welcome guests from all over the world to our growing collection of unique stays.

Our mission is simple:
To make your holiday feel effortless, relaxing, and memorable.
We're always looking to improve — so if you have any feedback or suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out.
Coastal Haven in Broadbeach Gold Coast
Arrive at the building entrance - parking is available in the secure basement
Use the access code {{CODE}}# to enter the building foyer
Take the lift to your designated floor
Key card will be left in the lockbox by the apartment door
Lockbox code will be sent via SMS 24 hours before arrival
Please vacate the apartment by 10:00 AM
Ensure all windows, doors and balcony are secured
Turn off all lights, air conditioning and appliances
Place key card back in the lockbox and scramble the code
Dispose of rubbish in the chute on your floor
Tip: Early check-in or late check-out may be available - please enquire at least 48 hours in advance. Additional fees may apply.
If you experience any issues with appliances or amenities, don't hesitate to get in touch.
We've got you covered with the basics, but here are a few essentials you might want to bring:
For life-threatening emergencies, always call 000 (Triple Zero) for Police, Fire or Ambulance.
Fire extinguisher: Located in kitchen cupboard
First aid kit: Bathroom vanity drawer
Emergency exits: Main door and fire stairs at end of corridor
Smoke alarms: Installed throughout apartment (tested quarterly)
Fire evacuation plan: Posted on back of main door
Address for Emergency Services: Broadbeach, Gold Coast, Queensland 4218 (provide specific unit number when calling)

One secure basement car space included with your stay. Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control located in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m. No parking in visitor bays - strictly enforced by body corporate.
Uber and DiDi are readily available throughout the Gold Coast. Local taxi service: 131 008.

The G:link light rail stops at Broadbeach South station, just a 3-minute walk from the apartment. The tram connects Broadbeach to Surfers Paradise, Southport, and Helensvale (with train connections to Brisbane).
Trams run approximately every 7-15 minutes during peak times. For timetables and real-time updates, visit the TransLink website or download the MyTransLink app.
Go Card is the easiest way to pay. Adult fares start from $3.31 for a single journey. Paper tickets also available from station machines.
Gold Coast Airport (Coolangatta) is approximately 25km south of Broadbeach.
Allow 30-40 minutes travel time depending on traffic.
While Broadbeach is very walkable with excellent public transport, a car is useful for exploring the wider Gold Coast region, hinterland, and theme parks.
Major rental companies have desks at Gold Coast Airport and in Surfers Paradise. Book in advance for better rates.
This apartment is subject to body corporate by-laws. Violations may result in fines, immediate eviction without refund, and loss of security bond. Please respect all residents and building rules.
Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment and on balconies. $500 cleaning fee applies if violated.
Pets are not permitted as per body corporate by-laws
Please respect neighbours - quiet time 10 PM - 7 AM on weekdays, 11 PM - 8 AM weekends
Maximum occupancy as per booking. No unregistered guests permitted.
Parties and events strictly prohibited. Body corporate security will remove violators.
Yellow bin for recycling, red bin for general waste. Bins located in kitchen.
Pool hours 6am-10pm. Children must be supervised. No glass in pool area.
One car space only. No parking in visitor bays. Strictly enforced by body corporate.
Modern fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, microwave, oven, and large fridge/freezer
Nespresso coffee machine - pods provided. Dishwasher tablets under sink. Induction cooktop - use magnetic cookware only.
Laundry powder provided. Select wash cycle, then dry cycle runs automatically. Takes approximately 3 hours total.
65" 4K Smart TV with Netflix, Stan, Disney+ and free-to-air
Remote on coffee table. Press 'Home' for apps. Login details for streaming services provided in welcome folder.
Wall panel in living area. Keep between 22-24°C for optimal comfort. Please turn off when leaving the apartment.
Private balcony with outdoor furniture and ocean/city views
Please keep balcony doors closed when air conditioning is running. No smoking on balcony as per body corporate rules.
One secure basement car space included
Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m.
Access to pool, spa, sauna, gym and BBQ area
Facilities located on Level 4. Pool hours 6am-10pm. Gym 24/7 access with key card. BBQ bookings via building manager.
Getting Around: G:link light rail stops at Broadbeach South (3 min walk) - connects to Surfers Paradise and Southport. Uber and DiDi readily available. Free parking at Pacific Fair for 3 hours.
